findings.summary: @ApiResponse(400) was wrong — SOAP client throws RuntimeException → 500; fixed to @ApiResponse(500)
400 description 'File missing' was imprecise; updated to reflect actual IllegalArgumentException paths
500 @ApiResponse had no @Content annotation; added application/json to match GlobalExceptionHandler
last-updated description clarified to note lastCrawledAt is nullable; always returns 200
GET /posts omits @ApiResponse(400) for sort-param errors — consistent with MetricController; acceptable pattern
